name: Silk Sarees

name: Cotton Sarees

name: kanjivaram saree
description: Authentic Kanjivaram sarees, handwoven by skilled artisans in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, are crafted from high-quality mulberry silk for superior weight, longevity, and rich texture. They feature contrasting borders and pallu woven separately in different colors, intricate genuine zari work (silk thread dipped in silver and gold), and traditional motifs like peacocks, elephants, parrots, checks (kottadi), and temple-style zigzag borders. — Janardhana Silk House +5
